address.address1: Jl. Gempar Alam, Dusun Terminal Lama, Desa Kemili, Kecamatan Bebesan, Kabupaten Aceh Tengah, 24519, Indonesia

description.short: The car parking and the Wi-Fi are always free, so you can stay in touch and come and go as you please. Conveniently situated in the Takengon part of Aceh, this property puts you close to attractions and interesting dining options.

details.title: Infant 0-2 year(s)
details.description: Stay for free if using existing bedding. Note, if you need a cot, it may incur an extra charge and is subject to availability.

details.title: Children 3-6 year(s)
details.description: Stay for free if using existing bedding.

adult: Guests 7 years and older are considered adults.
extraBed: Extra beds are dependent on the room you choose. Please check the individual room capacity for more details.
additional: When booking more than 5 rooms, different policies and additional supplements may apply.

features.featureName: Hot water linen and laundry washing
Physical distancing of at least 1 meter
Temperature check for guests and staff

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments:
Penginapan yg menjebak, harga yang tertera di aplikasi beda dengan di lokasi. 
Tamu diminta tambahan dana untuk menginap dengan fasilitas yang sebenarnya malah harusnya jauh lebih murah dari harga aplikasi. 
Kasurnya keras seperti bukan springbed. 
Terkesan menjatuhkan kalau saya ceritakan semua. Intinya tidak nyaman dan menyesal memilih wisma ini

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments:
foto kamar tidak sesuai aslinya !
foto yg dipajang adalah kamar yg lebih mahal.

tidak ada fasilitas air panas.

area parkir mobil terbatas.

pemilik tidak ngerti transaksi online. sudah bayar via agoda tapi dibilang duitnya blm masuk lalu disuruh bayar offline. jadi bayar 2x donk !! 
setelah bla2 panjang, pemilik lalu cek ulang dan dikasi check in. abisin waktu nunggu..
